div1.entryFree: Predicament, category, condition, situation: the offender's life lies in the mercy of the duke only, . . . in which p. thou standest, Merch. IV, 1, 357. that I descend so low, to show the line and the p. wherein you range, H4A I, 3, 168. piteous p.! even so lies she, Rom. III, 3, 86.
